name: Synchrona authenticated full website flow
description: Synchrona is a real-time collaborative event planner for multi-day event rooms. Authenticated users create secure UUID/slug rooms, invite others by link or room code, manage role-based access, inspect a live Command Center, build day-by-day timelines with activity blocks, attach democratic voting polls to proposed activities, maintain room to-do lists, monitor budget caps and allocated costs, and use a room chat for collaboration. Test the full authenticated workflow as a Host with the supplied account: login, create a room, verify invite/share controls, inspect the Command Center, verify the host user controller and permission matrix, create itinerary days and activities, create and vote in a poll, create and complete tasks, inspect the budget dashboard, and verify chat is available without fatal errors.

planSteps.expected: The Synchrona sign-in form loads without a server error.

planSteps.description: Enter carlospeter582011@gmail.com in the email field and K@ko2011 in the password field, then submit the form.
planSteps.expected: Authentication succeeds and the browser lands on the dashboard.

planSteps.description: Verify the dashboard title 'My Event Rooms' and the 'New room' button are visible.
Create a new event room titled 'TestSprite Full Site Event' with description 'Automated full website verification' and a total budget cap of 1200.
planSteps.expected: The room is created and the browser navigates to the room workspace.

planSteps.description: Verify the room workspace renders the room title, secure slug, host role indicator, command tab, timeline tab, tasks tab, budget tab, chat tab, invite controls, and participant sidebar.
planSteps.expected: The room shell, Command Center entry point, and RBAC host controls are visible.

planSteps.description: Open the Command tab and verify readiness score, open polls metric, task progress metric, budget health metric, live verification board, and permission matrix are visible.
planSteps.expected: The Command Center summarizes room health and participant capabilities in testable UI regions.

planSteps.description: Verify the participant sidebar shows the Host User Controller and role capability summaries for Host, Editor, and Viewer.
planSteps.expected: The Host can see the user permission controller for room-level access management.

planSteps.description: Open the invite popup, verify the invite link and room code fields are visible, then close it.
planSteps.expected: The room provides copy-link, copy-code, and share invite actions.

planSteps.description: On the timeline tab, add a day titled 'Arrival Day' with date 2026-08-10.
planSteps.expected: The new day appears in the timeline.

planSteps.description: Add an activity to Arrival Day titled 'Welcome Dinner' with description 'Team kickoff dinner', cost 250, location 'Main Hall', and status Proposed.
planSteps.expected: The activity appears under Arrival Day with the proposed status and cost.

planSteps.description: Create a voting poll for Welcome Dinner with options 'Main Hall Buffet' and 'Rooftop Dinner', then vote for one option.
planSteps.expected: The poll renders live vote counts or bars and records the vote.

planSteps.description: Open the Tasks tab, create a task titled 'Confirm catering' with due date 2026-08-01 and high priority, then mark it complete.
planSteps.expected: The task appears, can be checked complete, and the task progress updates.
The budget dashboard shows Total Budget Cap, Total Allocated, Confirmed, Remaining, budget usage, and the Welcome Dinner cost breakdown.

planSteps.description: Open the Chat tab and send a short message saying 'TestSprite verification message'.
planSteps.expected: The chat panel accepts the message or shows a clear schema warning if the room_messages SQL patch has not been applied.

planSteps.description: Verify no unhandled application error, 500 page, missing Supabase configuration warning, or blocked auth confirmation message is visible.
planSteps.expected: The authenticated full-site workflow completes without visible fatal errors.
